conflict_type: Conflicts between Keyword Constraints and Phrase Constraints
seed_instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo.
org_constraint: Ensure the email begins with the phrase "I hope this message finds you well."
new_constraint: Avoid using the word "message" in the opening sentence of the email.
instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo. Ensure the email begins with the phrase "I hope this message finds you well." Avoid using the word "message" in the opening sentence of the email.
response:
Here are a few options, depending on your tone and how much context you want to give:

---

### Option 1: Direct and Professional (Recommended)

**Subject:** Demo Request: [Your Company Name] & [Product Name]

Dear [Developer Name],

I hope this finds you well.

My name is [Your Name] and I'm the [Your Title] at [Your Company Name]. We are currently exploring solutions to [briefly mention the problem you are trying to solve, e.g., streamline our deployment pipeline or enhance our user authentication process], and your product, [Product Name], has come highly recommended.

I would be very interested in seeing a live demonstration of how [Product Name] operates. Could you please let me know what your availability looks like over the next week or two for a brief call?

Thank you for your time, and I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Your Company Name]
[Your Phone Number]

---

### Option 2: More Casual and Enthusiastic

**Subject:** Interested in a Product Walkthrough for [Product Name]

Hi [Developer Name],

I hope this finds you well.

I've been following [Product Name]'s progress and I'm genuinely impressed by [mention a specific feature or aspect you like, if you know one]. We are a team at [Your Company Name] and we are looking to implement a powerful tool for [area of focus].

Would you be open to scheduling a quick product demo so I can better understand how it fits into our workflow? Please suggest a few dates/times that work best for your schedule.

Thanks so much!

Best,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]

---

### Option 3: Very Brief (If you know them slightly)

**Subject:** Quick Demo Request - [Product Name]

Hi [Developer Name],

I hope this finds you well.

I'm keen to learn more about [Product Name]. Could you please provide some time slots for a product demonstration next week? I'd like to see it in action to evaluate its fit with our current development needs.

Thanks,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]<turn|>
